title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 04 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 04 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 04 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 04/06/2024
DCE iron ore futures continued to fall in a day，the main contract closed 834， an decrease of 2.11% throughout theday; some traders were negative to sell; Some steel mills purchased on demand. PBF at Shandong port dealt 830-840 yuan/mt; decreased 10 yuan/mt over yesterday. PBF at Tangshan port dealt 855-860 yuan/mt; decreased 5-10 yuan/mt over yesterday.
